children.heading: Delegation authorized
children.label: 1 Delegation authorized
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), the Secretary may delegate to any agency, office, officer, or employee of the Department the authority to perform any function transferred to the Secretary under section 6911(a) of this title or any other function vested in the Secretary as of . The authority provided in the preceding sentence includes the authority to establish, consolidate, alter, or discontinue any agency, office, or other administrative unit of the Department.1See References in Text note below.1October 13, 1994

children.label: A
children.text: sections 6942, 6971(f), 6993, and 2204e of this title and subsections (a) and (b)(1) of ;section 6981 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: sections 5692 and 5693 of this title; and

children.heading: Cost-benefit analysis required for name change
children.label: b Cost-benefit analysis required for name change

children.heading: Analysis required
children.label: 1 Analysis required
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Secretary shall conduct a cost-benefit analysis before changing the name of any agency, office, division, or other unit of the Department to ensure that the benefits to be derived from changing the name of the agency, office, division, or other unit outweigh the expense of executing the name change.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply with respect to any name change required or authorized by this chapter.

children.heading: Public comment on proposed reorganization
children.label: c Public comment on proposed reorganization

children.text: give appropriate advance public notice of the proposed reorganization action or delegation; and
afford appropriate opportunity for interested parties to comment on the proposed reorganization action or delegation.

children.heading: Interagency transfer of records, property, personnel, and funds
children.label: d Interagency transfer of records, property, personnel, and funds
A
children.text: any of the records, property, or personnel affected by the transfer or delegation of the function; and

children.label: B
children.text: unexpended balances (available or to be made available for use in connection with the transferred or delegated function) of appropriations, allocations, or other funds of the Department.

children.heading: Applicable law relating to funds transfer
children.label: 2 Applicable law relating to funds transfer
children.text: shall apply to any transfer of funds under paragraph (1).Section 1531 of title 31
an agency, office, officer, or employee of the Department.
